hypothesis: Implementing an online Bayesian optimization controller to adapt NaviDiv’s similarity-, fragment-, and n-gram-thresholds during REINVENT4 training on the singlet fission task will yield, after 1000 steps, a final mean pairwise Morgan similarity ≤0.12 while achieving a final median molecular score at least 10% higher than with fixed Combined constraints and ≥95% of the Baseline regime.
